title: fagara leratii
intro: Fagara leratii, also known as the Leratiu pepper tree or Wild pepper tree, is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, native to Madagascar. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagara leratii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to act as a natural antioxidant and immune system booster. Fagara leratii is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by extracting the plant's active compounds through various methods such as maceration and percolation.
